§ 002 — 03  /  Branding

Canion.

_Gourmet Resto

Year2025
TypeBranding
CategoryCollege
Scroll

Brief

Two cultures,
one vision.

Create a brand for a restaurant based on a clear vision, theme, culture, or art style. Develop a combination of two cultures, applying both visual languages and elements to collateral materials to create a unique experience for the customer.

Process

Maritime.
Dadaist.

Inspired by the Mar del Plata canyon expedition, CANION is an immersive dining experience where every detail evokes the magic and mystery of marine life. An evening here feels like a true maritime expedition — reinterpreted through the free-spirited and provocative lens of Dadaism.
